title: dianthus × lacinulatus
intro: Dianthus × lacinulatus, also known as the fragrant pink or pink fragrant, is a hybrid of the Dianthus species and is characterized by its pink to lilac-colored flowers with a strong sweet fragrance. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dianthus × lacinulatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Dianthus × lacinulatus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, making it a valuable addition to natural medicine.
